title: Improved/More Biomes
description: This datapack improves and adds new biomes! Custom light color support from 26.1
body:
This datapack changes world generation by having regular biomes updated with custom skies, custom trees, different ground, more variation!

- Improved Birch Forests (taller trees, different ground)
- Improved Forests (wider trees, different ground, fog sometimes)
- Improved Savannas (wider trees, stones, different ground, baobabs)
- Autumn Forests, now replaced by Windswept Savannas (autumn trees)
- Improved Taigas (custom sky, different ground and vegetation)
- Improved Snowy Taiga (custom sky)
- Improved Swamps (custom sky, giant mushrooms, new trees)
- Improved Stony Shore (ground made out of stone and cobblestone)
- Improved Dark Forests (custom mushrooms with vines)
- Arks added to rivers
- Improved Snowy Plains (custom sky)
- Improved Deserts (custom sky, oasis)
- Improved Badlands (custom sky)
- Improved cold biomes (custom sky)

### Custom light color (NEW, from 26.1)

Most of the biomes now have a specific light color; for example greenish light for flower forests.

![Flower Forest preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IZgBWgkV/images/fe2cf9b44f969958f70ff78cdcbf97ae41815b43.png)


## More datapacks

Use [Wind Waker Sky](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wind-waker-sky) datapack/mod for a colorful sky at night and red lighting during sunsets.
